data.title: MicroStrategy's Michael Saylor Risks Breaking Down The 'Magic Money Creation Machine' With His Growing Bitcoin Bet, Says Expert
data.description: MicroStrategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR) executive chairman Michael Saylor's growing Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) bet could unravel and break down the "magic money creation machine," warned an investment expert.

data.title: Warren Buffett Once Said Hiring Someone To Change Them Is 'Just As Crazy' As Marrying Someone To Change Them: 'The Reason That Berkshire Has Been Successful…'
data.description: Warren Buffett and Charlie Munger's leadership philosophy emphasizes the importance of integrity, intelligence, and energy in hiring and managing talent, with Buffett advocating for leaders who have a clear vision and the ability to inspire, while also acknowledging that leadership qualities can be developed over time.
